_meta.description: BSL Handshape Inventory - approximately 57 distinct handshapes used in BSL
sources: Sutton-Spence & Woll (1999) The Linguistics of British Sign Language
notes: BSL has approximately 35-60 distinctive handshapes depending on classification granularity
The 4 unmarked handshapes (B, 5, G, A) appear in ~50% of all BSL signs
Handshapes are labeled using a combination of ASL letter conventions and numeric BSL SignBank codes
Handshapes can be grouped into families based on selected finger configurations

handshapes.name: Flat hand (B)
handshapes.description: All fingers extended and held together, thumb tucked against palm or alongside index

handshapes.name: Open flat hand
handshapes.description: All fingers extended and spread slightly apart, thumb extended to side

handshapes.name: Spread hand (5)
handshapes.description: All five digits fully extended and widely spread apart

handshapes.name: Claw hand
handshapes.description: All five digits extended and spread, fingers curved/clawed at middle joints

handshapes.name: Fist (A)
handshapes.description: All fingers curled into palm, thumb wrapped alongside or across bent fingers

handshapes.name: Fist with thumb over (S)
handshapes.description: All fingers curled into palm, thumb wrapped over front of bent fingers

handshapes.name: Index point (G/1)
handshapes.description: Index finger extended, all other fingers curled into palm, thumb across curled fingers

handshapes.name: Bent index (X)
handshapes.description: Index finger extended and bent/hooked at middle joint, other fingers closed

handshapes.name: Index up, thumb out (D)
handshapes.description: Index finger extended upward, thumb extended to side, other fingers curled

handshapes.name: L-shape
handshapes.description: Index finger points upward, thumb extended horizontally to form an L, other fingers curled

handshapes.name: V-hand
handshapes.description: Index and middle fingers extended and spread apart, other fingers curled, thumb across

handshapes.name: Bent V / Clawed V
handshapes.description: Index and middle fingers extended and bent/clawed, spread apart, other fingers curled

handshapes.name: N-hand / H-hand
handshapes.description: Index and middle fingers extended and held together, other fingers curled, thumb across

handshapes.name: Bent N / Bent H
handshapes.description: Index and middle fingers extended and bent at middle joint, held together

handshapes.name: C-hand
handshapes.description: All fingers and thumb curved to form C-shape, fingers together

handshapes.name: Baby C / Small C
handshapes.description: Index finger and thumb curved toward each other in small C, other fingers curled

handshapes.name: O-hand (fingertips to thumb)
handshapes.description: All fingertips touch thumb tip to form a circle/O-shape

handshapes.name: Flat O / Pinch
handshapes.description: All fingertips pinched together touching thumb, hand flattened

handshapes.name: F-hand (index-thumb circle)
handshapes.description: Index finger and thumb form circle, other three fingers extended upward

handshapes.name: Y-hand
handshapes.description: Thumb and little finger extended, other three fingers curled into palm

handshapes.name: Little finger (I)
handshapes.description: Little finger extended, all other fingers and thumb curled into palm

handshapes.name: ILY-hand (thumb, index, little extended)
handshapes.description: Thumb, index finger, and little finger extended; middle and ring curled

handshapes.name: W-hand / 3-hand
handshapes.description: Index, middle, and ring fingers extended and spread, little finger curled, thumb across

handshapes.name: Closed W / 3 together
handshapes.description: Index, middle, and ring fingers extended and together, little curled, thumb across

handshapes.name: Four-hand
handshapes.description: All four fingers extended and spread, thumb tucked across palm

handshapes.name: Closed hand / Irish T
handshapes.description: Fist with bent index finger and thumb enclosed/tucked, thumb poking between index and middle

handshapes.name: E-hand (curved fingers)
handshapes.description: All fingers curved/bent at middle joints, fingertips near palm, thumb across

handshapes.name: Thumb up
handshapes.description: Thumb extended upward, all four fingers curled into fist

handshapes.name: Flat thumb / Thumbs across
handshapes.description: Thumb extended horizontally from closed fist

handshapes.name: R-hand / Crossed fingers
handshapes.description: Index and middle fingers extended and crossed, other fingers curled

handshapes.name: K-hand
handshapes.description: Index finger extended up, middle finger extended forward, thumb against middle finger base

handshapes.name: M-fist (three fingers over thumb)
handshapes.description: Fist with first three fingers draped over thumb, which is tucked underneath

handshapes.name: Horns hand (index + little extended)
handshapes.description: Index finger and little finger extended, middle and ring fingers curled, thumb across/curled

handshapes.name: Middle finger extended (8-hand)
handshapes.description: Middle finger extended, all other fingers and thumb curled

handshapes.name: Relaxed open hand (Lax-5)
handshapes.description: All five digits relaxed and slightly spread, fingers naturally curved, no tension

handshapes.name: Bent flat hand
handshapes.description: Four fingers together and bent at knuckles (90 degrees), thumb alongside or across

handshapes.name: Bent 5 / Bear claw
handshapes.description: All five digits spread and bent at knuckles, like a claw from above

handshapes.name: Index-thumb pinch (baby-O)
handshapes.description: Index finger tip touches thumb tip, other fingers curled or extended

handshapes.name: Flat spread hand
handshapes.description: All five fingers flat and spread wide, hand tense and flat

handshapes.name: Closed V / U-hand
handshapes.description: Index and middle fingers extended and together (not spread), other fingers curled
